Have Questions About Your Locker Room Project?

Get expert advice from 30+ years of experience. Free custom design consultation.

Get Free Consultation

PlayerStall

Luxury custom-built wood lockers with full color options. Quick ship in one month (24" width) or custom-built in three months. 30+ years of craftsmanship.

2934 200 Street, Langley, BC V2Z 2C1 Canada

sales@playerstall.com

QUICK CONTACT INFO

Premium wood lockers at unbeatable prices. Quick ship in 2–4 weeks or custom in 8–12 weeks. We'll match any USA competitor's price. Call for a free quote.

Saturday: 10am to 2pm
